task_instructions: 3M TDS files often follow the pattern: product description, product construction, physical properties matrix, then typical results pages.
Watch for 3M series and code patterns such as GT, VHB, DC, BT, and CBT.
brand_or_domain_conventions: 3M documents commonly use General Description, Product Construction, Physical Properties, and Typical Results as major sections.
Method graphics and adjacent narrative usually belong in method_html and method_image, not in item core fields.
table_patterns: 3M item matrices often appear in the Physical Properties section.
Chart titles often directly contain the test name and the comparison target.
negative_rules: Do not misread competitor chart lines as additional product codes.
Do not map marketing claims directly into parameter values without a dictionary fit.
few_shot_examples: For DC2000, Pluck, Torque, and Static Shear should become method cards plus related values.
For GT7100, the thickness-code matrix should primarily become items.
